narrative:
Crooksville Ex Vill Sd (Perry) exempted village school district has 3,084 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
